fd2da486-3f0b-483d-8c51-c76bc6eabb6b.label: text_chunk
fd2da486-3f0b-483d-8c51-c76bc6eabb6b.text:
NON DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT (NDA covering any Pitch Deck Fire organized workshop or event)
THIS AGREEMENT is made and entered into by all parties who participate in any way (as an event ticket holder or otherwise, paid event or otherwise) in _______Zero to Pitch Deck – February 11 th 2017_______ (“the Event”) that is organized by Pitch Deck Fire or it’s officers.

14fac03c-05fb-47a5-b2b9-d69005a628b9.label: text_chunk
14fac03c-05fb-47a5-b2b9-d69005a628b9.text: Parties agree to enter into this agreements by purchasing a ticket to or attending the event as on the date of the ticket purchased or event date, whichever comes first (“Effective Date”). The agreement covers information shared by and between any event participant (“the Disclosing Party”) and any other event participant, (“the Recipient”) (collectively, “the Parties”).

17ca5a3b-b81e-4e5b-b67e-d1a4e849b07f.label: text_chunk
17ca5a3b-b81e-4e5b-b67e-d1a4e849b07f.text: Purpose for Disclosure (“Business Purpose”):  Relevant information may be disclosed by the Disclosing Party to the Recipient during the course of activities of the event to collaboratively ensure that attendees fully understand and effectively utilize the training material. This agreement covers the entirety of the event and any and all information shared by any party at the event to any other party at the event or after the event.

bd15b577-0300-4b9a-89a2-91c5277f1097.label: text_chunk
bd15b577-0300-4b9a-89a2-91c5277f1097.text:
The information may be shared verbally, visually, in a document, via email or other digital forum.

 The Parties hereby agree as follows:
1. For purposes of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any and all non-public information, including, without limitation, technical, developmental, marketing, sales, operating, performance, cost, know-how, business plans, business methods, and process information, disclosed to the Recipient.

f7fb3209-400c-4f5a-aea4-9958b6b4c7cd.label: text_chunk
f7fb3209-400c-4f5a-aea4-9958b6b4c7cd.text:
For convenience, the Disclosing Party may, but is not required to, mark written Confidential Information with the legend "Confidential" or an equivalent designation.

2. All Confidential Information disclosed to the Recipient will be used solely for the Business Purpose and for no other purpose whatsoever.

fffe8ae0-8b70-431f-9556-16c6fec995b9.label: text_chunk
fffe8ae0-8b70-431f-9556-16c6fec995b9.text: The Recipient agrees to keep the Disclosing Party’s Confidential Information confidential and to protect the confidentiality of such Confidential Information with the same degree of care with which it protects the confidentiality of its own confidential information, but in no event with less than a reasonable degree of care.

58d4c36b-7fc4-464b-975f-e1fa03502125.label: text_chunk
58d4c36b-7fc4-464b-975f-e1fa03502125.text: Recipient may disclose Confidential Information only to its employees, agents, consultants and contractors on a need-to-know basis, and only if such employees, agents, consultants and contractors have executed appropriate written agreements with Recipient sufficient to enable Recipient to enforce all the provisions of this Agreement. Recipient shall not make any copies of Disclosing Party’s Confidential Information except as needed for the Business Purpose.

237805f0-d597-49c8-8429-29b8ccd4bbc8.label: text_chunk
237805f0-d597-49c8-8429-29b8ccd4bbc8.text: At the request of Disclosing Party, Recipient shall return to Disclosing Party all Confidential Information of Disclosing Party (including any copies thereof) or certify the destruction thereof.3. All right title and interest in and to the Confidential Information shall remain with Disclosing Party or its licensors. Nothing in this Agreement is intended to grant any rights to Recipient under any patents, copyrights, trademarks, or trade secrets of Disclosing Party.

95485ff1-69cc-4c16-81e4-e26cf84b7c7d.label: text_chunk
95485ff1-69cc-4c16-81e4-e26cf84b7c7d.text:
ALL CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION IS PROVIDED "AS IS".

 THE DISCLOSING PARTY MAKES NO WARRANTIES, EXPRESS, IMPLIED OR OTHERWISE, REGARDING NON-INFRINGEMENT OF THIRD PARTY RIGHTS OR ITS ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS OR PERFORMANCE.4.

02f46868-0e13-4758-8513-2e2806b1feec.label: text_chunk
02f46868-0e13-4758-8513-2e2806b1feec.text: The obligations and limitations set forth herein regarding Confidential Information shall not apply to information which is: (a) at any time in the public domain, other than by a breach on the part of the Recipient; or (b) at any time rightfully received from a third party which had the right to and transmits it to the Recipient without any obligation of confidentiality.5.

69726fb4-3480-4e07-8962-b1114e2b6fa2.label: text_chunk
69726fb4-3480-4e07-8962-b1114e2b6fa2.text: In the event that the Recipient shall breach this Agreement, or in the event that a breach appears to be imminent, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to all legal and equitable remedies afforded it by law, and in addition may recover all reasonable costs and attorneys' fees incurred in seeking such remedies.

3ddc3463-da42-4b18-b2ed-2ba8bd5394c7.label: text_chunk
3ddc3463-da42-4b18-b2ed-2ba8bd5394c7.text: If the Confidential Information is sought by any third party, including by way of subpoena or other court process, the Recipient shall inform the Disclosing Party of the request in sufficient time to permit the Disclosing Party to object to and, if necessary, seek court intervention to prevent the disclosure.6.    The validity, construction and enforceability of this Agreement shall be governed in all respects by the law of the state of Colorado.

000c55c5-e547-47c0-a418-fa1da6bfc350.label: text_chunk
000c55c5-e547-47c0-a418-fa1da6bfc350.text: This Agreement may not be amended except in writing signed by a duly authorized representative of the respective Parties. This Agreement shall control in the event of a conflict with any other agreement between the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof.IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.Pitch Deck Fire confirms that this information has been made clear and publically available to all event attendees.

4d0c204b-7afa-4114-82dc-b121ee684b94.label: text_chunk
4d0c204b-7afa-4114-82dc-b121ee684b94.text: Pitch Deck Fire agrees that if a Participant delivers to Pitch Deck Fire any information or data marked or identified as confidential or proprietary ("confidential information"), then Pitch Deck Fire shall not, except as otherwise permitted or instructed by the applicable Participant in writing (a) disclose or otherwise make available the confidential information to any third party except to the extent otherwise expressly permitted by this Agreement, (b) modify, copy, transmit, alter, merge, decompile, disassemble,

d18f00be-088a-49e0-9ca1-a7fd799c1625.label: text_chunk
d18f00be-088a-49e0-9ca1-a7fd799c1625.text:
reverse engineer or adapt any portion of the confidential information.

community_summary.1:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Disclosing Party and Recipient**: The Disclosing Party engages in a multifaceted relationship with the Recipient, characterized by the sharing and disclosure of information. This includes:
   - **Information Sharing**: The Disclosing Party shares information with the Recipient during events, facilitating communication and data exchange.
   - **Relevant Disclosures**: The Disclosing Party provides pertinent information to the Recipient to enhance the effective use of training materials.
   - **Confidential Information Provision**: The Disclosing Party supplies Confidential Information, which the Recipient is expected to manage according to specified terms.

2. **Obligations and Legal Framework**: The relationship is governed by legal obligations:
   - The Recipient is required to return or certify the destruction of the Confidential Information, highlighting a contractual obligation.
   - The Disclosing Party is involved in an Agreement that delineates the terms of information sharing, ensuring clarity and compliance.

3. **Protective Measures**: The Disclosing Party retains the right to object to subpoenas seeking Confidential Information, underscoring a protective stance regarding the information shared.

Overall, the relationships emphasize a structured exchange of information, legal responsibilities, and protective measures to safeguard Confidential Information between the Disclosing Party and the Recipient.

community_summary.13:
The relationships surrounding the "Agreement" highlight its critical role in governing the arbitration process and its binding nature on the involved parties. 

1. **Agreement and Arbitration**: The Agreement outlines the arbitration process, specifying the terms for resolving disputes that cannot be settled amicably. This establishes a structured approach to conflict resolution.

2. **Legal Framework**: The Agreement is governed by specific laws, indicating that its terms are subject to the legal framework, ensuring compliance and enforceability.

3. **Binding Nature**: The Agreement is binding on all parties involved, meaning that the outlined terms must be adhered to by each party, reinforcing accountability.

4. **Execution in Counterparts**: The Agreement can be executed in multiple counterparts, which together form a complete document, allowing for flexibility in how the Agreement is signed and acknowledged by the parties.

Overall, these relationships emphasize the Agreement's foundational role in arbitration, its legal grounding, the obligation it imposes on parties, and its practical execution.

2. **Responsibility for Affiliate Actions**: The Party holds responsibility for any disputes that may arise from the actions of its Affiliate. This indicates a direct accountability where the Party must address the consequences of the Affiliate's conduct.

3. **Binding Agreement**: The Party is bound by the terms of an Agreement that outlines its responsibilities and liabilities concerning the Affiliate and other involved entities. This relationship emphasizes the legal obligations the Party must adhere to.

4. **Control Over Company**: The Party can exert control over a Company if it owns more than fifty percent of its voting stock or shares. This relationship highlights the Party's ability to influence the Company's decisions and policies significantly.

5. **Access to Information**: The Party has access to Information as part of the agreement and is responsible for managing this Information, which includes ensuring confidentiality and compliance with relevant obligations. This relationship underscores the Party's role in handling sensitive data responsibly.

Overall, these relationships illustrate the Party's significant responsibilities and control within its network, emphasizing accountability, legal obligations, and the importance of confidentiality in its operations.
